atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports acne on her face, chest, and back.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports that acne began approximately two years ago.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports acne is present most days.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports she has been using persa-gel and washing regularly.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies associated symptoms such as itching.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies associated symptoms such as bleeding.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies associated symptoms such as pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a significant flare-up when she started school sports in the fall.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports experiencing sweating.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports her skin care routine involves wiping her face with water in the morning.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports using the Elf super clarity cleanser.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports using a toner.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports using persa-gel.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports applying adapalene 0.1% cream a few nights a week.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: A full examination was performed, excluding the undergarment and bra areas.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Multiple benign nevi were observed.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports skin-colored papules, open and closed comedones, and erythrema papules.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Scattered skin-colored papules, open and closed comedones, and erythrema papules were noted on the face.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The chest and back are relatively spared.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam findings are otherwise unremarkable.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient presents with mild to moderate acne.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports primarily comedonal acne with a small inflammatory component.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The acne is predominantly on the face.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I would like to start with a topical therapy.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Every morning, you will wash your face with a mild cleanser and use a moisturizer labeled 'noncomedogenic' with sunscreen SPF 30 or higher.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: In the evening, wash your face with the same cleanser and allow it to dry, then apply adapalene 0.1% cream to the areas where you experience acne.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Follow up in six months to assess progress.
